response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot exposure, but the resume shows minimal Java/Kotlin/Spring depth and no evidence of IDE internals or JVM tooling experience. Most recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. Java appears only as a listed skill with limited project context (robotic arms, mobile device orchestration years ago), and there is no Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience demonstrated.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and testing focus
Long track record building complex systems including low-latency microservices and developer tooling
Some C/C++ IDE-adjacent experience at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate ecosystem experience
No Kotlin experience and limited recent Java work
No evidence of IDE internals, language tooling, or JVM-level expertise

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin or IDE internals experience
Strong general engineering and tooling background
